_comment: CEFR Reading Import — POST /api/import/cefr/ with type: reading
title: B2 Reading Practice 1

passage.title: The Impact of Social Media
passage.content:
Social media has transformed the way people communicate...

Paragraph A: Origins of social media
Paragraph B: Benefits of connectivity
Paragraph C: Drawbacks and concerns

questions._comment_type: TRUE/FALSE/NOT GIVEN — correct_answer: TRUE | FALSE | NOT GIVEN
questions.content: Social media has had no effect on personal relationships.
questions.explanation: The passage clearly states social media has transformed communication.
questions.group_instruction: Questions 1-3: Do the statements agree with the information in the passage? TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.

questions._comment_type: YES/NO/NOT GIVEN — based on writer's opinion. correct_answer: YES | NO | NOT GIVEN
questions.content: The author believes social media should be banned.
questions.explanation: The author does not express this opinion anywhere.
questions.group_instruction: Questions 2-4: Do the statements agree with the views of the writer? YES, NO or NOT GIVEN.

questions._comment_type: Multiple Choice — correct_answer is the option letter: A, B, C or D
questions.content: What is the main advantage of social media according to the passage?
questions.explanation: Paragraph B mentions instant communication as the main advantage.
questions.group_instruction: Questions 3-5: Choose the correct letter A, B, C or D.

questions._comment_type: Multiple Select — correct_answer: pipe-separated e.g. B|D, max_selections = how many to choose
questions.content: Which TWO negative effects of social media are mentioned in the passage?
questions.explanation: The passage mentions anxiety (B) and reduced attention span (D).

questions._comment_type: Gap Fill — correct_answer is the missing word(s). No choices needed.
questions.content: Social media was first introduced in the ___ century.
questions.group_instruction: Questions 5-7: Complete the sentences. NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS.

questions._comment_type: Matching Headings — correct_answer is the heading option (i, ii, iii...)
questions.explanation: Paragraph A discusses the origins of social media.
questions.group_instruction: Questions 6-8: Choose the correct heading for each paragraph from the list below.

questions._comment_type: Short Answer — answer in own words, usually 1-3 words. No choices needed.
questions.content: According to the passage, what do young people use social media for most?
questions.explanation: The passage states communication is the primary use.
questions.group_instruction: Questions 7-8: Answer the questions. NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS.
